title: Demonic Possession
description: Animated demonic distortion and screen corruption shader.
body:
[![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1321365/description_19767e94-ef82-4569-92c6-b1e8b60e6e07.png)](https://discord.gg/XgH4EpyPD2)

> *Reality bends. Flesh tears. Something else is looking through your eyes.*

**Demonic Possession** is a psychological horror post-processing shader that transforms Minecraft into a collapsing nightmare. The world twists, fractures and pulses with unnatural life as if an unknown entity has taken control of both your vision and the game itself.

![a1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea2cca44a621e2d1a4e9c548790966c8ce964390.png)
![a2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e675966750d6e937745988eee016a94cde167da.png)
![a3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaf954180e13d0545afa1fd3339a381d1110c201.png)

Designed for horror maps, ARGs, analog horror projects and immersive possession sequences.

---

### 🩸 Features

**Living Spiral Distortion**
Reality is continuously pulled toward a shifting vortex. The effect intensifies over time, creating the sensation of losing control of your surroundings.

**Mirror Fractures**
The screen breaks into mirrored fragments during possession peaks, making familiar environments feel unfamiliar and wrong.

**Tearing Reality Artifacts**
Random horizontal tears distort sections of the screen, simulating corrupted perception and unstable vision.

**Demonic Color Corruption**
Natural colors are gradually drained and replaced with a hostile crimson palette. Shadows darken, highlights bleed red, and the world feels increasingly hostile.

**Vein Growth Overlay**
Animated vein-like patterns emerge beneath the image, resembling blood vessels spreading under skin or across the player's vision.

**Possession Pulses**
The shader periodically increases and decreases in intensity, creating moments of temporary clarity before plunging back into chaos.

**Heavy Closing Vignette**
Darkness slowly surrounds the player, producing a claustrophobic tunnel-vision effect.

**Corrupted Film Noise**
Subtle animated noise adds instability and reinforces the feeling of an entity interfering with reality.

---

### 🎮 Intended Use

* Horror Adventure Maps
* Analog Horror Projects
* ARG Experiences
* Ritual / Possession Sequences
* Psychological Horror Content
* Cinematic Storytelling

---

### ⚙️ Compatibility

|                 |                                                    |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| **Shader Type** | Post-Processing                                    |
| **GLSL**        | `#version 120`                                     |
| **Pipeline**    | Composite Pass                                     |
| **Iris**        | Supported                                          |
| **OptiFine**    | Supported                                          |
| **Minecraft**   | Most Java versions supporting GLSL 120 shaderpacks |

---

### ⚠️ Warning

This shader contains intense visual distortion, screen warping, flashing color changes, and strong vignette effects. It may cause discomfort for players sensitive to motion or visual instability.

> *You are no longer looking at the world. The world is looking back.*
